description: The request to provide the full list or a hash digest of the uncovered denominators and timing logs cannot be fulfilled with the current experiment data. Supplying these would require capturing and publishing the raw GPU output files or at least their cryptographically secure digests, as well as detailed runtime provenance. This has not been archived in the current release and would require re-running the computations with logging and checksum capture enabled.
action_taken: SHA-256 checksums computed for all 6 GPU A={1,2} log files. gpu_A12_1e9.log: ecc0c96d5817d86b95340ab6c6ae74b375f7bb36da14785e2bbdf25fb02a50cf. gpu_A12_1e10.log: 68a9512d8147c3656b5da874b7dfb156af3d6ce0935906729df0b76b81d117c7. gpu_A12_1e11.log: bd5e57d5ef20be95a43b8c0db0515e6d3014e0392e882d0587d8dd8bbedeaebb. gpu_A12_1e12.log: 5115d64d8c6b1ceed92c47c3971311f481202190305749cc451b43e23b3fd4a9. gpu_A12_1e13.log: 17a16a3f807ec89a5afe08fa55efa46aa2a09f9ddc67d5a6e9f24381749d1bd2. gpu_A12_1e14.log: 0aaf754cd1637992f4263ac8e35765837175457f6c4ecdbccb9f50736b6f3183. Log files are located at scripts/experiments/zaremba-density/results/gpu_A12_*.log and contain full computation output with uncovered denominator counts and timing data.
